hero.titleHtml:
Expose. Secure. Scale.
Bring your internal services to the world.
hero.lead: XTPro provides enterprise tunnel infrastructure for safe TCP/UDP/HTTP connectivity with low latency. From dev to production, we support every major OS and use case.
hero.cardFooter: Data synced in realtime from XTPro Control Center.

solutions.title: XTPro helps your team ship faster.
solutions.subtitle: Every stage from development and QA to production on Windows, Linux, macOS, and mobile.
solutions.c1Desc: Share internal apps with teammates, customers, automation, and webhooks in seconds.
solutions.c2Desc: Access SSH, RDP, databases, and internal cameras with layered auth and rate limits.
solutions.c3Desc: Optimized UDP with smart buffers, bandwidth control, and auto-reconnect.

platform.title: Realtime control—see every tunnel on one screen.
platform.subtitle: The new Control Center with light/dark themes, synced Chart.js charts, event toasts, and detailed connection state. WebSocket data streams continuously from the Go server.
platform.li1: Realtime stats: throughput, sessions, bytes, heartbeat
platform.li2: Tunnel table tuned for desktop & mobile

downloads.title: Download and deploy with one command.
downloads.subtitle: Go-native client & server binaries optimized for performance and security across major OSes.
downloads.linuxDesc: Companion scripts for systemd, Docker, and Kubernetes.
downloads.macDesc: Universal binary for Intel & Apple Silicon; brew tap supported.
downloads.androidDesc: Lightweight on Termux; OpenWRT & Raspberry Pi friendly.

quickstart.title: Friendly CLI, clear documentation.
quickstart.subtitle: Every command is annotated for newcomers. Bilingual docs (VI/EN) with a security checklist and troubleshooting.
quickstart.li1: 50+ real-world examples for HTTP, TCP, UDP
quickstart.li2: Auto-install scripts for Windows, Linux, macOS
quickstart.codeBlock:
# 1. HTTP tunnel (server assigns HTTPS subdomain)
xtpro --proto http 3000

# 2. Public SSH (default TCP)
xtpro 22

# 3. Multiple tunnels in one command (multi-port)
# Syntax: [proto:]local[:remoteRequest]
xtpro tcp:2222:11111 udp:53 http:3000 3389

# 4. Connect to your own server
xtpro --server your-vps.example.com:8882 --ports "http:3000 tcp:22 udp:19132"

cta.title: One command to take your services global.
cta.subtitle: Sign up for free; upgrade when you need more tunnels, richer stats, or team admin.

footer.meta: FREE for non-commercial use • Contact us for enterprise licensing & SLA support.
